profile_text:
Name: Josselyn Chavez

Current status: Career pivot

Job type: Full Time Role

Target roles: Chief of Staff, HRBP, Strategy and Business Operations, Strategy Consultant, Business Operations,

Target locations: Miami, Remote, Hybrid

Preferred locations: Miami, Remote, Hybrid

Timeline: Immediate

Strong skills: CoS, Project Management, HRBP, Calm our of Choas, Organization, cross-functional, problem solving,

Biggest concern: getting interviews

Openness to non-obvious entry points: Very open

Resume:
JOSSELYN CHAVEZ
Chief of Staff  |  Senior HR Leader  |  Strategy & Operations
Miami, FL  �  310-500-6664  �  JossYajaira@gmail.com  �  linkedin.com/in/josschavez  �  Bilingual: English & Spanish


Strategic operator and people leader with 10+ years building the infrastructure, systems, and rhythms that let executive teams move faster and with greater clarity. Equally at home as a Chief of Staff driving cross-functional alignment and executive enablement, or as a senior HR leader standing up people operations from scratch � multi-state payroll, benefits, compliance, workforce planning, and succession. Background spans Fortune 500 global infrastructure ($8B+ revenue, 12,000+ employees) and high-growth startups, always partnering directly with EVP, SVP, and VP-level leaders.
CAREER HIGHLIGHTS


Executive Partnership  �  Strategic right hand to EVP, SVP, and VP-level leaders at Equinix � owning operating cadence, decision-making rhythms, and cross-functional alignment across AMER, EMEA & APAC




People Operations Build-Out  �  Built complete HR departments from zero for two companies � handbooks, onboarding, payroll, benefits, compliance frameworks, and GL structure across U.S. and LATAM jurisdictions




Cost Reduction  �  $70K+ quarterly OpEx savings at Equinix via vendor optimization; $40K reimbursement reduction at Axys within 4 months of implementing RAMP




Workforce Scaling  �  Grew Savydney Madox from 0 to 23 employees in 4 months; operational second-in-command for 65 FTE / 15 contractor team at Axys spanning U.S. and LATAM




Organizational Change  �  Led sequencing, leadership alignment, and communications for a multi-region restructuring impacting 1,000+ employees




Succession & Development  �  Designed OKR/GPS frameworks for 27 AMER positions; led succession planning for Manager through VP; onboarded multiple incoming SVPs, RVPs, and Chiefs of Staff




Executive Engagement  �  Planned 15+ investor tours, CABs & Analyst Summits; developed 50+ executive talk tracks; directed 4 ELT offsites for 100�150 attendees




Performance Recognition  �  Assessed Exceeded expectations, FY2023 � 'Joss has it all: people skills, intelligence, teamwork, and the most important ingredient � common sense'

CORE COMPETENCIES
?  Chief of Staff Functions
?  HR Infrastructure & Compliance
?  Strategic Planning & OKRs/KPIs
?  Multi-State Payroll & Benefits
?  OpEx/CapEx Governance
?  Workforce & Succession Planning
?  Cross-Functional Program Mgmt
?  Organizational Restructuring
?  Executive Communications
?  Compensation Strategy
?  Stakeholder Alignment
?  Vendor & Contract Management

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
Strategy & Internal Operations Consultant                                                                                     Jan 2025 � Present
Savydney Madox LLC (Apr�Sep 2025)  |  Axys LLC (Oct 2024�May 2025)  |  Additional engagements
Built full HR departments from scratch for two companies � handbooks, onboarding, performance management, and multi-state payroll & compliance across U.S. and LATAM; trained teams to own systems independently.
Negotiated full benefits suites (healthcare, 401k, Workers� Comp) and established GL structure ahead of bringing on a dedicated finance controller.
Partnered with Finance on annual planning, reforecasting, and compensation benchmarking across engineering, operations, logistics, and corporate functions.
Advised leaders on employee relations, performance management, and organizational change; led succession planning programs from Manager through VP level.
Chief of Staff / Sr. Technical Program Manager   �   Equinix, Inc.                                     Feb 2020 � Jan 2025
CoS to EVP & GM, Digital Services; VP, Partnerships & Ecosystem Strategy  (May 2024�Jan 2025)
CoS to SVP, Americas Operations; RVP, IBX Operations  (Feb 2020�Apr 2024)  
8B+ revenue  �  12,000+ employees  �  AMER, EMEA & APAC
Owned the operating cadence for Americas Operations � aligning 8�12 functional leaders across Engineering, Finance, HR, Legal, Procurement, and Customer Success on priorities, QBRs, and executive decisions.
Governed $4M+ OpEx/CapEx portfolio via Coupa; maintained real-time budget visibility across all AMER departments and metros; escalated risks and funding needs directly to EVP/SVP leadership.
Built OKR/KPI dashboards to support a 1,000+ employee multi-region restructuring; developed GPS/OKR frameworks for 27 positions across all AMER levels.
Managed AMER Spot Awards program across 4 regions with payroll, HRBP & Legal; led multi-country compliance for Chile and Peru; supported confidential workforce planning, headcount approvals, and on-call policy development.
Served as interim CoS during leadership gap; onboarded and trained incoming Chief of Staff; directed 4 ELT offsites for 100�150 attendees and 15+ investor tours and analyst summits.
Operations Manager / HRBP Consultant   �   Chestnut Hill Technologies                            Aug 2019 � Feb 2020
Partnered with CEO, Board, and Senior Controller on operations, finance, HR, and governance for a $16M cyber and IT risk consulting firm.
Co-managed P&L, payroll, and HR operations; led full-cycle HR generalist functions alongside contracts, vendor management, MSAs, and scopes of work.
EARLIER CAREER
HR Manager, Ascendo Resources  �  Senior HR Generalist, Permaswage  �  HR Advisor, Munchery  �  Senior HR Coordinator, LA Film School  �  Office Manager, StatStaff  �  HR Assistant, CPEHR
TOOLS & SYSTEMS
HRIS & Payroll
Workday HCM  �  ADP Workforce Now & RUN  �  UltiPro  �  Paycom
Finance
NetSuite  �  QuickBooks  �  Coupa  �  Concur  �  RAMP
Project Mgmt
Smartsheet  �  Lucidchart  �  IBM Maximo
Analytics
Power BI  �  Oracle BI  �  Salesforce
Productivity
Microsoft Office Suite  �  Google Workspace  �  SharePoint  �  Confluence  �  Teams  �  Zoom  �  Slack
AI Tools
Claude  �  ChatGPT  �  Microsoft Copilot (executive drafting, deck prep, meeting summarization, workflow automation)

EDUCATION & CERTIFICATIONS
B.S., Business Management   |   Art Institute of Santa Monica
Certified Associate in Project Management (CAPM)   |   PMI
